name: HelpBook
author: NovaStark1234
readme_markdown:
HelpBook | v1.0.0


✔️ Add manuals to your server ✔️


## Features - A Beginner's Guide - When type command '/helpbook', you will be given a manuals book - Easy to custom in **config.yml**
## Commands | **Commands** | **Description** | | --- | --- | | **/helpbook** | **Get the Guidebook** |
## Permissions | **Permission** | **Default** | | --- | --- | | **helpbook.command.use** | **true** |
## Config ``` --- BookTitle: "Title" BookAuthor: "Author" BookText: - "Text 1 line 1{line}Text 1 line 2" - "Text 2 line 1{line}Text 2 line 2" - "Text 3 line 1{line}Text 3 line 2" ... ```
## Install - Step 1: Click the "Direct Download" button to download the plugin - Step 2: Move the file "HelpBook.phar" into the file "plugins" - Step 3: Restart server for plugins to work
